title: Polokwane, Limpopo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Polokwane, Limpopo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Polokwane is a city in Limpopo with a population of 130,000. The capital of Limpopo province, a rapidly growing city known for its mining and agricultural sectors.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
